form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr3) over 1760m at Junee was 7th-13.2 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Sokys Falcon (2:10.80) in NR 40 to 48 on March 31 at $18. At the start before 4th (Fr5) over 1720m at Young, at the bell was 3rd-5.9 beaten 4.5 m by Lucky Zara (2:05.50) in NR 40 to 44 on March 24 at $7.50. From a low draw is expected to measure up.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into seventh behind Kristysgirl at Leeton over 1758m in a NR 41 to 47 on March 10 at $3.50. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 3rd (Fr3) over 1635m at this track was 3rd-5.4 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Pad Thai (2:) in NR 43 to 48 on March 3 at $5. Sure to be there at the business end.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr2) over 1730m after showing early speed at Bathurst was 4th-7.64 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Lucky Punt (2:04.50) in NR up to 47 on April 1 at $19. Before that, 9th (Sr1) over 1720m at Young was 8th-15 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Lucky Zara (2:05.50) in NR 40 to 44 on March 24 at $26. Can make amends.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced behind the tiring Paddy Mach near the 400m.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr3) over 1710m at Goulburn, at the bell was 5th-7.2 beaten 6 m by Always Be Brendan (2:02.90) in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $13. At the run before 6th (Sr4) over 1720m at Young was 10th-19.6 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Lucky Zara (2:05.50) in NR 40 to 44 on March 24 at $16. Better than recent form suggests; great chance to bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running in the home straight.
Approaching the 600m shifted out momentarily inconveniencing Pad Thai.
Held up for clear running over the concluding stages of the race.
Hung out shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 5th (Fr2) over 1710m at Goulburn, beaten 25 m by Rudimentary (2:04.00) in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $51. Before that was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr7) over 1740m after being wide early at Riverina Paceway, beaten 12 m by Warieda Boy (2:04.40) in NR up to 45 on March 13 at $61. This will be too tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out throughout the early stages of the race.
Inside the final 200m momentarily locked wheels with Sports Liner.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, was well back in the run when 5th (Fr5) over 2170m at Junee was 7th-13.6 at the bell, beaten 18 m by My Latin Lady (2:48.00) in NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $26. Before that 8th (Fr5) over 1720m at Dubbo, beaten 35 m by Loyola Golf (2:05.10) in NR 46 to 48 on March 15 at $151. Will need some luck to figure.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third after being driven well back, behind Roll To The Top at Riverina Paceway over 2270m in a NR up to 48 on March 20 at $13. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.5 m finishing second behind Sokys Falcon at Junee over 1760m in a NR 40 to 48 on March 31 at $7. Sure to be thereabouts again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked passing the 200m when Shaken Sandsbroke gait.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr6) over 1760m at Junee was 8th-15.4 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Sokys Falcon (2:10.80) in NR 40 to 48 on March 31 at $26. Two runs back 5th (Sr4) over 1720m at Young was 5th-11.7 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Excuse To Cullect (2:04.70) in NR 45 to 47 on March 24 at $34. This looks far too tough.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 3.5 m third behind Sokys Falcon at Junee over 1760m NR 40 to 48 last start. Before that was beaten a nose second at Young over 1720m in NR 45 to 47 on March 24. Expected to be in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced shortly after the start when Magic Matteo broke stride.
Caught wide early before working forward to lead at approximately 1100m.

form.formComment: Tired badly when resuming on March 3 at this track behind Mister Seaside over 1635m 2 WINs. Needs to lift.
